mapper.select: SELECT session_id, student_id, biz_domain, session_status, current_stage, current_round, missing_dimensions_json, last_message_at, completed_at, final_profile_id, remark FROM ai_chat_sessions WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1

SELECT session_id, student_id, biz_domain, session_status, current_stage, current_round, missing_dimensions_json, last_message_at, completed_at, final_profile_id, remark FROM ai_chat_sessions WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND biz_domain = #{bizDomain} AND session_status = 'active' AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY update_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_chat_sessions ( session_id, student_id, biz_domain, session_status, current_stage, current_round, collected_slots_json, missing_dimensions_json, last_message_at, created_by, updated_by, create_time, update_time, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{sessionId}, #{studentId}, #{bizDomain}, #{sessionStatus}, #{currentStage}, #{currentRound}, #{collectedSlotsJson}, #{missingDimensionsJson}, #{lastMessageAt}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, #{now}, #{now}, '1' )
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_chat_sessions SET final_profile_id = #{finalProfileId}, current_stage = #{currentStage}, session_status = 'active', completed_at = NULL, remark = #{remark}, updated_by = #{studentId}, update_time = #{now} WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND student_id = #{studentId} AND delete_flag = '1'
mapper.select: SELECT message_role, message_type, sequence_no, content, create_time FROM ai_chat_messages WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND delete_flag = '1' AND is_visible = 1 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT content_json FROM ai_chat_messages WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND delete_flag = '1' AND message_role = 'system' AND message_type = 'internal_state' AND content = 'progress_extraction_result' ORDER BY sequence_no DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_chat_messages ( session_id, student_id, message_role, message_type, sequence_no, content, content_json, is_visible, stream_chunk_count, create_time, update_time, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{sessionId}, #{studentId}, #{messageRole}, #{messageType}, #{sequenceNo}, #{content}, #{contentJson}, #{isVisible}, #{streamChunkCount}, #{now}, #{now}, '1' )
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(sequence_no), 0) + 1 FROM ai_chat_messages WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND delete_flag = '1'
SELECT current_round FROM ai_chat_sessions WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1

SELECT id, session_id, student_id, result_status, profile_json, radar_scores_json, summary_text, db_payload_json, save_error_message, create_time, update_time FROM ai_chat_profile_results WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1

SELECT id, session_id, student_id, result_status, profile_json, radar_scores_json, summary_text, db_payload_json, save_error_message, create_time, update_time FROM ai_chat_profile_results WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY update_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT session_id, result_status, radar_scores_json, summary_text, save_error_message, create_time, update_time FROM ai_chat_profile_results WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY update_time DESC, create_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_chat_profile_results ( session_id, student_id, biz_domain, result_status, profile_json, radar_scores_json, summary_text, db_payload_json, save_error_message, create_time, update_time, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{sessionId}, #{studentId}, #{bizDomain}, #{resultStatus}, #{profileJson}, #{radarScoresJson}, #{summaryText}, #{dbPayloadJson}, #{saveErrorMessage}, #{now}, #{now}, '1' )
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_chat_profile_results SET student_id = #{studentId}, biz_domain = #{bizDomain}, result_status = #{resultStatus}, profile_json = #{profileJson}, radar_scores_json = #{radarScoresJson}, summary_text = #{summaryText}, db_payload_json = #{dbPayloadJson}, save_error_message = #{saveErrorMessage}, update_time = #{now} WHERE id = #{profileResultId}
mapper.select: SELECT student_id, result_status, radar_scores_json, summary_text, save_error_message, create_time, update_time FROM student_profile_guided_results WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY update_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT draft_id, session_id, student_id, biz_domain, draft_json, last_patch_json, source_round, version_no, create_time, update_time FROM ai_chat_profile_drafts WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_chat_profile_drafts ( session_id, student_id, biz_domain, draft_json, last_patch_json, source_round, version_no, create_time, update_time, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{sessionId}, #{studentId}, #{bizDomain}, #{draftJson}, #{lastPatchJson}, #{sourceRound}, #{versionNo}, #{now}, #{now}, '1' )
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_chat_profile_drafts SET student_id = #{studentId}, biz_domain = #{bizDomain}, draft_json = #{draftJson}, last_patch_json = #{lastPatchJson}, source_round = #{sourceRound}, version_no = #{versionNo}, update_time = #{now} WHERE draft_id = #{draftId}
